# Data folder

## raw/

One CSV per short recording, grouped by activity folder. Columns:

```
timestamp, accel_x, accel_y, accel_z, gyro_x, gyro_y, gyro_z
```

**Currently populated with synthetic data**, generated by the notebook's
`simulate_session()` function, standing in for real Sensor Logger exports
until data collection finishes. The schema matches exactly what a real export
should look like, so replacing these files with real recordings (same folder
structure, same column names) requires no changes to the notebook beyond
pointing `load_real_data()` at this directory.

Files are named `<activity>_<train|test><session_idx>_<file_idx>.csv`.

## processed/

Reserved for windowed/feature-extracted exports if you want to cache them
separately from the notebook (e.g. `windowed_features.csv`). Currently empty;
the notebook keeps features in memory rather than writing them here, since the
full pipeline re-runs quickly enough not to need a cache.
